generated_oml:
// Sensing Components
instance HokuyoLaserSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST‑10LX LiDAR producing 3‑D point cloud data."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudTransmission
]

instance IntelD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i depth camera capturing depth imagery."
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthImageTransmission
]

instance VehicleSpeedEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed encoder providing ego‑speed in encoder counts."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EgoSpeedTransmission
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering angle sensor measuring wheel steering in degrees."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleTransmission
]

instance VehicleCANBus : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle CAN‑bus interface transmitting telemetry states."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CANTelemetryTransmission
]

// Data Transmitted (ROS2 Topics)
instance LiDARPointCloudTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoLaserSensor
]

instance DepthImageTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelD435iDepthCamera
]

instance EgoSpeedTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedEncoder
]

instance SteeringAngleTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance CANTelemetryTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleCANBus
]

instance ObjectTrackTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    // No producedFrom relationships needed for processed data
]

// Processed Data
instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed LiDAR point cloud with unit conversion, aligned for clustering."
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudTransmission
    DTDFVocab:inputTo LiDARClusteringEnabler,
                KalmanTrackingEnabler
]

instance DepthImageData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed depth image with coordinate mapping for tracking."
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthImageTransmission
    DTDFVocab:inputTo KalmanTrackingEnabler,
                RenderingEnabler
]

instance EgoSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Ego vehicle speed in m/s after unit conversion."
    DTDFVocab:fromData EgoSpeedTransmission
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationEnabler,
                KinematicModelEnabler
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Steering angle in radians after calibration."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleTransmission
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationEnabler
]

instance CANTelemetryData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle CAN telemetry archived for audit and analysis."
    DTDFVocab:fromData CANTelemetryTransmission
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DatabaseArchiverEnabler
]

instance ObjectTrackData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived object tracks with ID, pose, and predicted future trajectory."
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTrackTransmission
    DTDFVocab:inputTo KalmanTrackingEnabler
]

// Enablers
instance DataTranslationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Ensures unit consistency across sensor streams and meets ≤100 ms end‑to‑end latency."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService,
                    RemoteManagementService
]

instance LiDARClusteringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Runs DBSCAN clustering on LiDAR point clouds."
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance KalmanTrackingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Tracks objects using Kalman filter based on LiDAR and depth data."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService,
                    ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance RenderingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Converts sensor data to 3‑D meshes for operator visualization."
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance DatabaseArchiverEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Archives raw sensor streams and telemetry into a SQL database."
    DTDFVocab:enables ReportGenerationService
]

instance KinematicModelEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Runs vehicle kinematic model to compute desired speed for ACC."
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

// Services
instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides real‑time UI displaying speed, steering, object tracks, and projected path."
    DTDFVocab:provides LiveTelemetryInsight,
                ObjectTracksInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Runs ACC algorithm on the DTO, computing desired speed and sending commands to the vehicle."
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCCommandAction,
                ACCAlgorithmPerformanceInsight
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enables operators to enable/disable ACC, set desired speed, and issue emergency brake."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCAction,
                SetDesiredSpeedAction,
                EmergencyBrakeAction
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Renders 3‑D visualization of vehicle and environment."
    DTDFVocab:provides Visualization3DInsight,
                VisualizationUpdateAction
]

instance ReportGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates human‑readable CSV/JSON timeseries of vehicle state and event logs."
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationReportInsight,
                ReportGenerationAction
]

// Insights
instance LiveTelemetryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real‑time UI display of ego speed, steering angle, and object tracks."
]

instance ObjectTracksInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual representation of detected object tracks and their predictions."
]

instance ACCAlgorithmPerformanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Metrics such as time to desired speed and smoothness of ACC."
]

instance Visualization3DInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "3‑D rendering of vehicle and environment for operator analysis."
]

instance OperationReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Human‑readable CSV/JSON timeseries of vehicle state and event logs."
]

instance PredictiveMaintenanceAlertInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Alerts based on sensor data and model predictions indicating impending failures."
]

// Actions
instance ACCCommandAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Send computed desired speed and steering command to the vehicle via ECS."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enable ACC functionality on the vehicle."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Set desired cruise speed for ACC."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakeAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Trigger emergency brake via actuator."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance VisualizationUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Refresh 3‑D visualization frame."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ReportGenerationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generate CSV/JSON report."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// Core System Components
instance ScaleAutonomousVehicle : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "1/10‑scale autonomous vehicle based on Traxxas teleoperated platform, retrofitted with NVIDIA Jetson NX and Orin Nano, Hokuyo LiDAR, D435i depth camera, and Vedder ESC."
]

instance ActuationFunctionalEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Actuation Functional Entity converting desired speeds into motor voltage commands and steering angles, driving the vehicle’s electronic speed controller and steering servo via ROS2 topics."
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Digital twin issues actuator commands over ROS2 topics to the vehicle’s actuator interface: desired speed, steering, and emergency braking commands are transformed by the Actuation Functional Entity and forwarded to the electronic speed controller and steering servo for physical actuation."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "All interactions are synchronized to a 100 ms clock grid; data collection and command issuance occur at up to 10 Hz, ensuring an end‑to‑end latency of ≤100 ms between physical event and virtual response, as mandated by R7."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The constellation is an ISO 23247‑based architecture: (i) Observable manufacturing element (vehicle) represented by the Physical Twin Entity; (ii) Digital Twin Entity hosting simulation, data collection, and ACC computation; (iii) User Entity exposing 3D visualization and control panels; (iv) Cross‑System Entity (Data Translation). Components are orchestrated via ROS2 topics over Wi‑Fi between vehicle and edge server."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT covers the manufacturing‑as‑built phase (representation of the physical vehicle in its built state), the operational phase (live monitoring, computation offloading, and remote control during vehicle operation), and maintenance/monitoring phase (generation of diagnostic reports and predictive maintenance alerts)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "ACC behavior validated against ISO 15622 (performance class I) with closed‑loop simulation; data translation enforces unit consistency; 100 ms clock synchronization ensures temporal validity; real‑time latency requirement of ≤100 ms guarantees operational validity; database consistency checks performed during report generation."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Physical twin to digital twin connection is a Wi‑Fi radio link (2.4 GHz/5 GHz) with ROS2 topics; ROS2 uses UDP multicast for intra‑system communication; Data Translation FE performs serialization/deserialization; end‑to‑end latency is measured and bounded to ≤100 ms."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin Entity is hosted on an edge or cloud server (e.g., laptop or cloud VM) connected via Wi‑Fi; ROS2 nodes for data collection, simulation, and ACC run on this host; the database resides on an external storage attached to the same host; the Physical Twin Entity runs on the vehicle’s Jetson Orin Nano and UDP sockets to the edge server."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 (reference architecture), ISO 15622 (ACC control standard), ROS2 (middleware), NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0, OPC UA (optional data translation)."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety‑critical operations governed by ISO 15622 and by a strict 100 ms latency and 100 ms clock‑sync requirement; emergency braking commands are protected and validated; DNS/ACL on ROS2 topics enforce access control; remote ACC control mitigates potential safety risks with human‑in‑the‑loop oversight."
]
